dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Donald Trump on mental toughness—‘What separates the winners from the losers is how a person reacts…’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump highlights that success depends on how we respond to setbacks. His quote stresses resilience, adaptability, and mindset. Challenges are inevitable, but winners grow from them, using obstacles as opportunities to adjust, learn, and move forward stronger.

dailyNews.title: Senate temporarily extends nation’s controversial spying powers after House fumbles
dailyNews.description: The Senate voted unanimously to extend FISA surveillance powers after the House failed to reauthorize the program in the dead of night before its fast-approaching deadline.

dailyNews.title: Long lines form at tribal gas stations as drivers chase steep discounts amid high fuel costs
dailyNews.description: Some U.S. drivers report saving up to 75 cents per gallon by filling up at tribal gas stations in various locations, which often skip state fuel taxes on tribal land.
